params.name: accountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

params.name: areaCode
params.description: Three-digit area code to search

params.name: npaNxx
params.description: Six-digit NPA-NXX combination to search

params.name: rateCenter
params.description: Rate center name to search

params.name: city
params.description: City name to search

params.name: state
params.description: Two-letter state abbreviation

params.name: zip
params.description: Five-digit ZIP code to search

params.name: lata
params.description: LATA code to search

params.name: quantity
params.description: Number of results to return (1-5000, default 5000)

params.name: tollFreeWildCardPattern
params.description: Toll-free number pattern using wildcards (e.g., 8**) for toll-free number searches

params.name: enableTNDetail
params.description: Include detailed information for each number

params.name: localVanity
params.description: Vanity number search pattern

items.docs: Searches Bandwidth's inventory for available phone numbers matching the specified criteria. Supports searches by area code, NPA-NXX, rate center, city, state, ZIP code, and LATA. Returns up to the requested quantity of available numbers.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

params.name: status
params.description: Filter by order status

params.name: startDate
params.description: Filter orders created on or after this date

params.name: endDate
params.description: Filter orders created on or before this date

items.docs: Retrieves a list of phone number orders for the account. Supports filtering by order status, date range, and other criteria.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

items.docs: Creates a new order to purchase phone numbers from Bandwidth's available inventory. The order specifies which numbers to purchase and the site and SIP peer to assign them to. Order status can be tracked via the GET endpoint or webhook callbacks.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

params.name: orderId
params.description: The unique identifier for the order

items.docs: Retrieves detailed information about a specific phone number order including its current status and list of numbers ordered.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

params.name: status
params.description: Filter by port-in status

params.name: startDate
params.description: Filter requests created on or after this date

params.name: endDate
params.description: Filter requests created on or before this date

items.docs: Retrieves a list of number porting requests for the account.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

items.docs: Initiates a number porting request to transfer phone numbers from another carrier to Bandwidth. The request includes subscriber information and the list of numbers to port.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

params.name: portInId
params.description: The unique identifier for the port-in request

items.docs: Retrieves detailed information about a specific number porting request including its current status and timeline.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

items.docs: Creates a request to disconnect and release phone numbers from the account. Disconnected numbers are returned to Bandwidth's available inventory.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

items.docs: Retrieves a list of all sites (sub-accounts) configured within the Bandwidth account.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

items.docs: Creates a new site (sub-account) within the Bandwidth account. Sites provide logical groupings for organizing telephony resources.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

params.name: siteId
params.description: The unique identifier for the site

items.docs: Retrieves detailed information about a specific site.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

params.name: siteId
params.description: The unique identifier for the site

items.docs: Updates the configuration for a specific site.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

params.name: siteId
params.description: The unique identifier for the site

items.docs: Deletes a specific site. The site must have no active SIP peers or phone numbers assigned to it.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

params.name: siteId
params.description: The unique identifier for the site

items.docs: Retrieves a list of SIP peers (locations) configured within a specific site.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

params.name: siteId
params.description: The unique identifier for the site

items.docs: Creates a new SIP peer (location) within a site. SIP peers define the network endpoints for call routing and number assignment.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

params.name: siteId
params.description: The unique identifier for the site

params.name: sipPeerId
params.description: The unique identifier for the SIP peer

items.docs: Retrieves detailed information about a specific SIP peer.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

params.name: siteId
params.description: The unique identifier for the site

params.name: sipPeerId
params.description: The unique identifier for the SIP peer

items.docs: Updates the configuration for a specific SIP peer.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

params.name: siteId
params.description: The unique identifier for the site

params.name: sipPeerId
params.description: The unique identifier for the SIP peer

items.docs: Deletes a specific SIP peer. The SIP peer must have no active phone numbers assigned to it.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

params.name: siteId
params.description: The unique identifier for the site

params.name: sipPeerId
params.description: The unique identifier for the SIP peer

items.docs: Retrieves a list of phone numbers assigned to a specific SIP peer within a site.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

params.name: page
params.description: Page number for pagination

params.name: size
params.description: Number of results per page

params.name: city
params.description: Filter by city

params.name: state
params.description: Filter by state abbreviation

params.name: lata
params.description: Filter by LATA code

items.docs: Retrieves a list of phone numbers assigned to the account. Supports filtering by various criteria including city, state, and LATA.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

params.name: phoneNumber
params.description: The phone number to look up (digits only)

items.docs: Retrieves detailed information about a specific phone number including its assignment, features, and configuration.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The unique identifier for the Bandwidth account

params.name: phoneNumber
params.description: The phone number to update features for

items.docs: Creates a feature order to configure features such as CNAM, directory listings, and line features for a specific phone number.
